Professional Summary

As a fresh graduate, I bring enthusiasm, a strong desire to learn, and a commitment to delivering quality results in any professional environment. I am confident in my ability to adapt quickly, collaborate effectively with teams, and contribute meaningfully to organizational goals from day one. I am actively seeking an opportunity where I can apply my academic foundation in Information Technology and continue developing professionally.
